name: econ-review
description: Produce a rigorous, source-grounded referee report and prioritized revision plan for an economics paper.

interface.longDescription: Review an economics or social-science paper with source-grounded checks of its argument, methods, evidence, contribution, exhibits, and writing, then produce a constructive referee report and prioritized revision plan.
defaultPrompt: Use econ-review in full mode to review this economics paper and produce a constructive referee report.
Use econ-review in quick mode to identify the largest risks to this paper's claims.
Use econ-review to check whether this paper's argument, methods, evidence, and contribution are convincing.
